command: fabio git commit --workspace $WS_ID --message "Add ETL notebook and update lakehouse" --items '[{"objectId":"e5f6a7b8-c9d0-1234-ef01-34567890abcd"}]'
description: Commits workspace changes to the connected git repository.
notes: Commit is LRO (returns 202, polls until Succeeded/Failed). The --items flag selects specific items; omit to commit all changes. workspaceHead is auto-fetched from git status. Use 'fabio git status' first to see pending changes. If no changes exist, API may return error.

query_examples.description: Error details if failed (null on success).
